\SE[4]Dario, you're late...! You call someone out and then make them wait this long...!?
...Oh, finally showed up, did you? \n[1], Dario, I've been waiting.
The Village Chief, and Elly too...? Dario, what in the world is this...?

\SE[1]Hold on, the old man's gonna explain it now. C'mon, Village Chief. Tell these guys
about that story too.

\SE[5]...When will you ever learn how to speak to your elders........ Hah... Well, fine.
Elly, \n[1], Dario... I want to entrust you three with an important job\SE[1]

\SE[default]...It all started a little while ago when the lord visited this village. He took an
interest in the cave to the north of the village. You know, that cave where \n[1] and
Mana exterminated the monsters before.

The lord is interested in that place...? But there wasn't anything special there, was
there...? It was just a dilapidated cave.

\SE[3]But it seems the lord thought otherwise... He dispatched adventurers and even used
gunpowder to dig further into the cave. Then, apparently, they found an old mine
shaft that had been filled in behind the walls.
\SE[3]A mine shaft...? Was that area a mine in the old days?

\SE[6]So it seems... Even I, who have lived in this village for generations, didn't know
about it... It must be a remnant from when monsters were still plentiful around here.

\SE[4]Anyway, it seems the lord wants to revive that mine... But a problem has arisen with
advancing through that shaft.

\SE[6]It seems the path is blocked by bedrock further in the shaft... The ground there is
too fragile to use gunpowder. If they tried to blast it, the whole shaft would
collapse and bury them alive.
skit fadeIn ダリオ t left

So that's where we come in! \n[1]! We'll remove the rocks by hand and clean up the
shaft nice and tidy! The strongest, youngest guys in the village―that's us! We've
been entrusted with this great task!

I-I see... It sounds like tough work... But if the lord says so, we can't refuse,
right?

\SE[19]...Huh? Then why was I called? If it's manual labor, you guys can handle it
yourselves, right? Can I go home now? I'm still in the middle of my part-time job?

\SE[1]Hah? Isn't it obvious...! 'Cause two guys alone in a cramped cave is unbearable! We'd
suffocate from the man-stink in a situation like that...!

\SE[2]But if you're there with us, it's totally different, right? Well, having a girl
around probably won't be much help... Oh, can you at least make tea?

\SE[18]Don't mess with me, you idiot! I can't just take off work for something so trivial!?
Make your own damn tea!

\SE[5]Ehh... Then I'm gonna lose my motivation too... Haaah, and this is an important
request from the lord... At this rate, it'll never get done........

\SE[5]Hah... Well, regardless of this fool's reasoning, it will be harsh labor, so we'll
need someone to support the two of you. So, Elly, please accompany them as well.
\SE[23]U... O-okay. If the Village Chief says so........
Alright, since everything's decided... We're heading straight to the mine shaft now!
Huh!? Right now!? Hey, wait up, Dario!?
\SE[11]You idiot, I need to prepare too...! H-hey, let go! I need to get my stuff first...!

\SE[2]You're here, \n[1]. You're late, you've always been a sleepyhead since you were
young... You should learn to wake up early already, like us old folks! Hoho...!
\SE[default]......Hmm. That girl was tired too, so I let her sleep at your house for now.

... Has the effect of yesterday's incense worn off already? Is she back to her normal
self now?

\SE[6]Hmm? It seems you've misunderstood the effect of that incense... Do you think all of
Elly's unrest yesterday was because of that scent?

Y-yes! There's no way Elly would desire an old man like you... It's impossible!
Without that incense, that girl would...!

\SE[1]Hoho... It's true that incense also has the effect of heightening sexual desire.
However, at the same time, it also has the effect of making people honest. The
weakness Elly showed yesterday is that girl's true feelings themselves.
F-family... the village chief... the old men...♡

I understand... Your loneliness of not even knowing your own parents' faces. You were
seeking a father... a man... from the bottom of your heart, weren't you...?

I don't want to be scolded by Papa anymore...♡ Elly will be a good girl forever...♡
So, don't abandon me...♡

\SE[1]Hoho... That girl was trying not to show any weakness to you. She was putting on a
brave face so as not to burden her brother... But from my perspective, that girl's
anxieties were plain as day, you know?

\SE[2]Elly was starving for family love, for affirmation. Girls like that are convenient
for us old folks. A lonely little girl like that is easy to bring down...♡

\SE[1]Hoho! Don't get upset...! This is our, this village's way of surviving. For you two,
it was better than being left with no one and dying in a ditch, wasn't it?

Guh...... Even so, this is too much. This kind of treatment, isn't it pitiful for
Elly...!
\SE[3]...Wait, where do you think you're going?

... I'm taking that girl and leaving the village. For all the care we've received
until now, I'll definitely come back to repay it someday. ......So please pretend our
relationship never existed.

\SE[6]Now wait... I don't mind if you disappear as long as the money comes in... But Elly,
who has completed the ritual, can no longer leave this village.
... What do you mean by that?

\SE[2]Yesterday's ritual was something like a contract between that girl and us old folks.
When that girl declared in front of the ancestral statue yesterday that she would
become a member of this village, an ancient magic passed down through generations was
activated...

\SE[9]Well, I've never actually seen its effect myself... But I've heard it's like a curse
that kills traitors to this village. If you take Elly outside, I cannot guarantee
that girl's safety.

Tha...that's...! Not only did you bewitch that girl with drugs, but you also intend
to forcibly make her belong to this village with magic!?

\SE[2]Hoho... The incense was merely a catalyst. I just gave her true wish that final push
to make it come true.

\SE[1]Yesterday, that girl became one with us old folks and reached climax together... And
so, from the bottom of her heart, she wished to stop being alone and to live together
with us.

\SE[default]Without such a heartfelt wish, that ritual would not have been completed. Elly was
originally starving. She harbored that desire... to be loved by others... by men.

\SE[default]So I merely tried to soothe that by making her a member of this village. ...In your
place, who left that girl alone.

\SE[2]And so, that girl can no longer leave this village. You should give up and accept
that your sister has become our property. Now, this conversation is over.

...If what the chief says is true, what do I do...? I was ready to make enemies of
the whole village to save Elly...! But if there's magic like that, there's nothing I
can do...!

\SE[5]Don't glare at an old man like that...! Kuku... How frightening... Outsiders always
try to solve problems with violence...
\SE[2]Well then... I'll let you solve this problem in a way fitting for an outsider.

\SE[1]I'll give you one condition for us to lift Elly's curse. Erase the fact that I raised
you two. Repay the debt of all the care I've given you until now.

...! Is it just a matter of paying money? Th-that's easy then! If I go back to the
Royal City, I can earn it quickly...!

\SE[default]...Indeed, that would be attractive to me as well... But the others wouldn't accept
it. Especially the young ones... For Dario, a wife is more important than money, I'd
wager...

\SE[1]Therefore, from now on, you will work within the village to earn money. Obey the
villagers, work like their hands and feet... Make everyone accept that you have made
a great contribution to the village.

Chief, what are you planning to make me do...? ...I don't know, but it seems like
there's no other way anyway. Then, I have no choice but to accept these
conditions...!
O-okay...! I'll pay back the money, and we'll leave this village!
\SE[2]Hohohoho... The deal is settled then. Well then, \n[1], I'll have you pay 10,000G.
T-ten thousand!? How am I supposed to earn that much money in this village...!?

\SE[6]I've given you two food and a place to live for over ten years. This much is only
natural. ...No matter how long it takes, I will have you repay the full amount.
...During that time, does that mean the villagers won't have sex with Elly...?

\SE[2]That's an impossible request! Elly is already like our wife... I can't stand not
being able to fuck my own woman as I please!

Guh, I've been tricked...! If I take my time and Elly ends up pregnant with a
villager's child... I'll never be able to sever our ties to this village...!

...Well, even if I set such conditions. Whatever we say here is meaningless. In the
end, everything depends on that girl's feelings, right?
...What are you saying...? Are you saying Elly wants to stay in a village like this?

Hoho... \n[1]. In your spare time between work, you should watch that girl carefully...
You'll understand her true nature, which she never shows in front of you.

That girl, you see, no longer wants to leave this village. Your sister is already
ours.

...Anyway, I want to see Elly. He said she's at home... I'm hungry too, so I should
go back once. Elly should be making dinner...
